author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — owner-level encapsulation decision (Coordinator API surface).

**Fix outline:** Change Coordinator::queue_mut (src/coordinator/mod.rs:71) from pub to pub(crate). The doc comment already acknowledges this is the desired visibility; landing the tightening is the fix. External callers should drive the queue through Coordinator's own typed submit/cancel methods rather than borrowing the inner TaskQueue mutably.

**Recommendation:** Owner-level call on whether external Coordinator users currently rely on queue_mut (audit needed). The doc comment says 'tighten when a stable submit API lands' — that submit API is the prerequisite. Defer until the submit API is designed.
